titleStmt.title: SII 38.135: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 135. (A.R. No. 135 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north base, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Built in at the beginning. Begins with his meykīrtti.

Records that the ūrār of Elinuḻai, a village in Paiyyūr-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻamaṇḍalam sold land as maṭhapura-dēvadānam after receiving both the price-money and tax-money, to Nakkaṉ Tiruvaraṅkakōṉ alias Mummuḍichōḻa Brahmamārāyaṉ (a resident) of Śiṟuvandi in Śoḻaśūḷāmaṇi-chēri in Vīranārāyaṇach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a taṉiyūr in Rājēndraśīṅga-vaḷanāḍu (a subdivision) of Paiyyūr-kōṭṭam in Chōḻamaṇḍalam. It is stated that the buyer in turn donated the same to the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr for maintaining the Rājēndrachōḻaṉ-maṭha as maṭhapuram-dēvadānam. The ūrār also declared the land they sold, as tax-free, for the enjoyment of the maṭha (iṟaiyili-ēkabhōgam).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ciyaṟkuriya maitarai maṇimuṭi cūṭṭi taṉki vaṟkukiyal kaliyum veṟu peṟaruḷiya pukka mukka katakkaḷiṟu Ekettu kaḻal kāṟc caḷukki muṭi cūṭṭi toṇṭaimaṇṭalaṅ kuṭuttaruḷit tāṇṭiṟaṉ pār perum putalvaril rājen=tira coḻaṉai Eḻu ṉai coḻa pāṇṭiyaṉ Eṉṟu tarai maṇimuṭi ticaiyiṟc cuṭṭip pāṇ pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ kuṭuttaruḷi Āṇṭakai Irumuṭicoḻaṉaip perumaiyilellāta taṉṉoṭu merkka vaittaruḷi paḷḷañcura coḻaṉai coḻakeraḷaneṉṟan=tami
kiya vikkiyaṉṟevi nātavayeṉṟu tokaiyañ cā ḷiye muṭakāṟṟuṭai puṟaṅkaṇṭuyaṭaittoḻil virattoṭu malakkam vikkalaṉ ṟaṉṉeṭu varicilait taṭakkai ṉ cāman=ta kaṅ k kaḷattiṭaiyiṉ tuṅkapattirai pukatturatti Āṅkavar veṅkai naṉṉāṭiṭai miṭṭa varaviṭṭa tāṅkarum peravarait tāṇṭu kiṭat tākki mātāṇṭanāyakaṉ cāmuṇṭarāyaṉai ceṟṟavaṉ cirattiṉai Aṟuttu
teṭumukku verukka mikai ttaṭakkatira maṇpurutiyum kan=tapurit tokutiyum matakkaḷiṟṟirunta toṭum vāri pontu kaṭakoḻittuk koṭi mukkāṭṭuyar puvimicai vaṇpukaḻoṭu viḷaṅka ceṅkoli (ticaitoṟum) ticai toṟuñ cellavaṉkaliṉṟivā koṭi tiyākakoṭiyoṭu meṟi vāvarukaveṉṟu niṟpa kācu toḻilurimaiyil Aracu viṟṟiruntu mevaru manuneṟi viḷaṅkiya korājakesaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrī virarājen=tiratevaṟku yāṇ
ṭu 4 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu paiyyūr koṭṭattu Eyilūr nilai Elinuḻaiūrom nilavilaiāvaṇakkaieḻuttu coḻamaṇṭalattu paiyyūr koṭṭattu rājen=tiraciṅka vaḷanāṭṭut taṉiyūr śrīviranārāyaṇac catuppetimaṅkalattu coḻacūḷāmaṇicceri Iṭaiāṟṟukkuṭi cāvān=ti nakkaṉ tiruvaraṅkakoṉāṉa mummuṭi coḻabrahmamārāyaṉ tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiya mahādevaṟku rājen=tiracoḻaṉ maṭattukku maṭappuṟat tevatānamāka nāṅkaḷiṟaiyili Ekapokamāka viṟṟu kuṭukkiṟa nilattukku
kiḻpāṟkellai caṭṭippaṭṭi Aṟapperuñcelvi Āna ceṟuvil mel varampukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai paṭampakkatteri vaṭakaraikkum tiruveṅkaṭattāṉ kuḻi vaṭakaraikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai naṅkaiceyyāḷeṉṟa ceṟuviṉ melvarampukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tirumulattānamuṭaiya mātevar tevatānam camuttirameṉṟa ceṟuviṉ teṉ varampukku teṟkum tiruvoṟṟiyūraṉ keṇiyiṟ teṉkaraikku teṟku Iṉṉāṉkellaikkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Uṇṇila
moḻiviṉṟi Iṉṉilan timenir kiṇaṟkurittākavum viṟṟuk kuṭuttom viṟṟuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicain=ta vilaipporuḷu miṟaippoḷurum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kiḻikaiyaṟa celakkoṇṭu vilaiyaṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟak koṇṭum vilaiāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom Elinuḻai Ūrom Itukku Ituve poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ cilavolai Āvatākavum Ituveṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ cilavolai kāṭṭukaveṉap peṟātomākavum Ipparicicaintu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Iṉṉilattiruntu
payirceyyuṅ kuṭikaḷai Eccoṟṟu kūṟṟunel veṭṭi Amañci Eppeṟpaṭṭatum kāṭṭapiṟā tomākavum Iṉṉipan=tam muṉṉiṉṟome celutta kaṭavomākavum celuttāviṭiṟ muṉṉiṉṟa mā[ śvarare] muṉṉiṉṟa vurārai tiruvoṟṟiyūr tanmāsanattile niccam kuṉṟip poṉ maṉṟa peṟuvatākavum maṉṟiyum maṉṟu pāṭiṟuttu Iṉṉiman=tam celuttak kaṭavomāṉom Elinuḻaiūrom Ivvūr Āluvaṉ Aravaṇaiyāṉ ciraḷaṅkovineṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Icaintu viṟ
ṟuk kuṭutteṉ kāṇippākkiḻāṉ vāṇakovaneṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Icaintu viṟṟuk kuṭutteṉ Ālai kaṇṇiṟai kiḻāṉ tiruvāliincomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
